tools.name: check_order_status
tools.description: Check the current status, shipping carrier, tracking number, and estimated delivery date for a customer order. Use this when the customer asks about their order, package, or delivery.

order_id.description: The order number, e.g., ORD-1234 or #1234

customer_email.description: Customer email address for identity verification (optional but recommended)

responseMapping.template: Order {{order_id}}: Status is '{{status}}'. Shipped on {{ship_date}} via {{carrier}} (tracking: {{tracking_number}}). Estimated delivery: {{delivery_date}}.

tools.name: check_inventory
tools.description: Check if a product is in stock and how many units are available. Use this when the customer asks about product availability.

product_name.description: The product name if SKU is not available

responseMapping.template: Product '{{name}}' (SKU: {{sku}}): {{#if in_stock}}In stock ({{quantity}} units available).{{else}}Currently out of stock. Expected restock: {{restock_date}}.{{/if}}

tools.name: create_return_request
tools.description: Create a return or exchange request for a customer order. Use this after confirming the return is within the return window and the customer wants to proceed.

type.description: What the customer wants: a refund, an exchange, or store credit

customer_email.description: Customer email for return label and confirmation

responseMapping.template: Return request created (ID: {{return_id}}). A prepaid shipping label has been sent to {{email}}. Once we receive the item, your {{type}} will be processed within 5-7 business days.

tools.name: create_support_ticket
tools.description: Create a support ticket when the issue cannot be resolved automatically or when the customer requests human assistance.

description.description: Detailed description of the issue based on the conversation

priority.description: Ticket priority — use 'high' for frustrated customers, 'urgent' for legal threats

responseMapping.template: Support ticket #{{ticket_id}} has been created. Our team will contact you at {{email}} within {{response_time}} business hours.
